etimesUsing only her teeth, woman creates detailed sculptures including the Great Wall of ChinaChen Qin, a 25-year-old from Hubei, China, is captivating the internet with her unique talent. She carves detailed sculptures from carrots using only her teeth. Her creations range from animals to famous landmarks. Qin discovered this skill by accident and has since gained over 1.2 million followers. Her work, which takes time and effort, also tells historical stories.
